query:
CREATE TABLE `push_subscriptions` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`endpoint` text NOT NULL,
	`p256dh` text NOT NULL,
	`auth` text NOT NULL,
	`sellerId` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `push_subscriptions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
